tailored.title: Day 1 at Google Cloud Next ’26 recap
tailored.summary: Why this matters: Google Cloud CEO Thomas Kurian emphasizes the need for a unified stack with chips designed for models, models grounded in data, and agents and applications built with those models, all secured by infrastructure, which aligns with NetPresso's multi-agent platform goals.

tailored.title: AIDC-AI/Pixelle-Video
tailored.summary: Why this matters: Pixelle-Video is an AI fully automated short video engine that can automatically complete tasks like video editing and voice synthesis, which could be integrated into NetPresso for enhanced media processing capabilities.

telecom.title: ExAI5G: A Logic-Based Explainable AI Framework for Intrusion Detection in 5G Networks
telecom.summary: Why this matters: ExAI5G proposes a framework integrating deep learning with logic-based explainable AI for intrusion detection in 5G networks, enhancing trust and operational response, which is crucial for telecom AI safety and governance.

telecom.title: Verizon CEO emerges as telecom's AI doomster-in-chief
telecom.summary: Why this matters: Verizon's CEO comments on AI's impact on job cuts reflect the need for AI governance and responsible AI deployment in the telecom sector, a topic Krishna should address in his writing.

telecom.title: LLM-Based Net Analyzer rApp for Explainable and Safe Automation in O-RAN Non-RT RIC
telecom.summary: Why this matters: The proposal of an LLM-based net analyzer for explainable and safe automation in O-RAN environments highlights the importance of AI explainability and safety in telecom, aligning with Krishna's interests in AI safety and governance.

top_stories.title: India’s app market is booming — but global platforms are capturing most of the gains
top_stories.summary: Why this matters: The growth of India's app market, driven by non-gaming apps including those leveraging AI, indicates a potential area for NetPresso's application and the importance of considering global market trends in AI and telecom.
